raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "Flags one missing or wrong citation.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'strongest published baseline' claim).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified claims about CockroachDB 30–40ms number, SLOG citation, YugabyteDB/TiDB latency numbers, and the novelty of the latency-vs-abort tradeoff curve).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: Flags one missing or wrong citation.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'strongest published baseline' claim).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression (unverified claims about CockroachDB 30–40ms number, SLOG citation, YugabyteDB/TiDB latency numbers, and the novelty of the latency-vs-abort tradeoff curve).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason.
